footer.tagline: The great trail-running festival in the heart of nature, around the Ria d'Étel in Brittany. 2027 edition on October 16.

patrimoine.title: Natural heritage
patrimoine.text: This former river valley flooded by the sea is home to remarkable biodiversity: migratory birds, fish, shellfish and unique flora. We are committed to preserving this treasure through various actions:
patrimoine.caption: House with blue shutters — Saint-Cado Island (Morbihan)
patrimoine.altPanorama: House with blue shutters, Saint-Cado Island
